main.description: Submit the result of an XRPC task assigned via com.example.dispatcher.subscribe. Call via PDS proxying so the server can verify the caller's DID.

actor.description: DID of the caller. Must match the service-auth token issuer.

result.description: Return value from the executed XRPC.

error.description: Error name if the XRPC failed.

errors.name: UnknownTask
errors.description: taskId not found or already completed.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: Missing or invalid inter-service auth token.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: actor does not match the token issuer.
